title: Design System: Nadakkavu Digital Twin Platform

display.purpose: Large tabular metric numbers in KPI cards only.

title.purpose: Detail panel headers and entity IDs.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked eyebrows at section boundaries.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default 150ms transitions on hover and focus states.

motion.name: pulse-loading
motion.purpose: Skeleton loading blocks. Disable under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.10); color: #38bdf8; border: 1px solid rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.30); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.20); border-color: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.50); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.60); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.20); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: KPI Card
components.description: Metric summary tile on dashboard overview.
components.html:
Total buildings
12,847
across 4 wards
components.css: .ds-kpi-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-kpi-card:hover { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10); } .ds-kpi-label { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-kpi-value { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #38bdf8; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-kpi-sub { font-size: 10px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Item Active
components.html: Overview
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; margin: 0 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-active { background: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.10); color: #38bdf8; border: 1px solid rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.20); } .ds-nav-icon { opacity: 0.7; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Nav Item Default
components.html: Buildings
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; margin: 0 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-default { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-nav-default:hover { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.60); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); } .ds-nav-icon { opacity: 0.7; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Filter bar text field for tables and lists.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Search by ID, road, locality…" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.70); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.20); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.40); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.css: .ds-status-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-status-occupied { background: rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.12); color: #34d399; border: 1px solid rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.25); } .ds-status-dot { width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; }

components.name: Ward Chip Active
components.css: .ds-ward-chip { padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; background: transparent; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40); } .ds-ward-chip:hover { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.70); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); } .ds-ward-active { color: #38bdf8; background: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.10); }

components.name: Detail Panel Tab
components.description: Tab bar in building detail panel.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-tab { flex: 1; padding: 8px 0; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: capitalize; background: none; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-tab:hover { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.50); } .ds-tab-active { color: #38bdf8; border-bottom-color: #0ea5e9; }

narrative.overview: Nadakkavu is a municipal digital-twin dashboard where design serves the data, not the other way around. The interface reads as an always-on operator desk: a dark midnight shell holding a lattice of ward metrics, infrastructure coverage, and domain modules. Visual hierarchy comes from size, weight, and tabular alignment — not decoration. Surfaces are structurally flat. Depth is communicated through hairline borders and stepped opacity layers — never drop shadows.
keyCharacteristics: Dark command-center shell with a second neutral layer for sidebar, topbar, and detail panels
Fixed rem type scale tuned for density (9–14px UI range, 24px KPI values)
Multi-signal semantic palette for data categories (success, warning, domain colors)
Hairline borders (rgba(255,255,255,0.06)) as the primary depth mechanism
Skeleton loading states, not mid-content spinners
tabular-nums on all metrics; monospace for entity IDs

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Sky (#38bdf8) is the only accent on navigation and chrome. Semantic colors (emerald, amber, violet) appear only on data, status indicators, and chart elements — never on inactive buttons or decorative borders.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: Body backgrounds stay in the midnight navy family. Warm sand, cream, or paper tones are prohibited — warmth lives in data semantics and Kerala-specific content, not in the shell.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Product UI uses fixed rem sizes, not fluid clamp headings. A sidebar-adjacent h1 that shrinks is worse than a consistent 14px title.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: All numeric metrics use tabular-nums. KPI values, ward counts, percentages, and table numbers must align for scan comparison.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The only depth cue is the hairline border plus one opacity step. If you reach for box-shadow, use a border instead.

rules.name: The No-Glass Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur and glassmorphism are prohibited unless serving a specific overlay (modal scrim). Decorative glass cards are never the default.

dos: Do use sky (#38bdf8) exclusively for primary navigation, selection, and affirmative actions.
Do reserve emerald, amber, and violet for data semantics — status, coverage, category breakdowns.
Do use hairline borders (rgba(255,255,255,0.06)) and opacity-layer surfaces for all depth.
Do apply tabular-nums to every numeric metric and font-mono to entity IDs.
Do ship skeleton loading states (pulsing opacity blocks) test.
Do keep section labels (9px uppercase) to genuine section boundaries — one per panel, not per card.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce — replace pulse animations with static states.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS dashboard patterns — cream/warm backgrounds, hero-metric card grids, eyebrow labels on every section, interchangeable startup aesthetic.
Don't use sci-fi / cyberpunk command center tropes — neon overload, holographic gimmicks, decorative glow that obscures data.
Don't reproduce legacy government portal patterns — cluttered tables with no hierarchy, dated UI, bureaucratic density without structure.
Don't borrow consumer map app casualness — Google Maps simplicity is too undifferentiated for institutional governance.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) for emphasis — use weight and size.
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop blur as a default card treatment.
Don't use emoji as navigation icons when Lucide is available — maintain consistent icon vocabulary.
Don't animate layout properties — use opacity and color transitions only, 150–250ms ease-out.
